Enter the Arena! Build your Battle Deck and outsmart the enemy in fast real-time battles. From the creators of CLASH OF CLANS comes a real-time multiplayer battle game starring your favourite Clash characters and more. Start battling against players from around the world! BECOME A MASTER OF STRATEGY AND DECK BUILDING Choose unique Cards to your Battle Deck and head to the Arena for Battle! Place your Cards right and knock down the enemy King and Princesses from their Towers in a strategic and fast-paced match. COLLECT AND UPGRADE 100+ CARDS Hog Rider! Collect and upgrade 100+ Cards featuring the Clash of Clans troops, spells and defences you know and love and many others. Win battles and progress to new Arenas to unlock powerful new Cards to your collection! BATTLE YOUR WAY TO THE TOP Battle your way to the League and Global Tournaments to match against the best players in the world. Compete for glory and rewards! SEASONAL EVENTS Unlock new Seasonal items like Tower Skins, Emotes and powerful Magic Items with the Season Pass and participate in fun Challenges that put your skills to the test! JOIN A CLAN AND GO TO WAR Join or form a Clan with other players to share Cards and battle in Clan Wars for BIG rewards! See you in the Arena! PLEASE NOTE! Clash Royale is free to download and play, however, some game items can also be purchased for real money. If you don't want to use this feature, please disable in-app purchases in your device's settings. The game also includes random rewards. ※ Notice of Access Permission: [Optional permission] Clash Royale may request permission via in game pop-ups to access your camera and send you notifications. Camera: For in-game scanning of QR codes Notifications: For sending notifications related to the game Consent is optional and you can use the app and play the game regardless of whether or not you consent. You may refuse to give consent within the game. However, certain app features may not work properly if you refuse optional access permissions"A network connection is also required. Support Are you having problems? Visit https://help.supercellsupport.com/clash-royale/en/ or contact us in game by going to Settings > Help and Support. War is still broken 01/15/2021 I have a love/hate relationship with this game but it is still my single favorite mobile game. However, the matchmaking in War is beyond broken. Probably half the time, I am playing decks with an average level 2-3 higher than mine. I'm not sure that I have ever written a game review but I am hoping Supercell's developers hear enough reviews like this to actually make a change. It is all but impossible to overcome a deck with all level 13 when you have a mix of 10 and 11. It's gotten to the point that I usually just quit as soon as it becomes obvious that the person I am playing against isn't terrible because I just have nearly 0% chance to win otherwise. Not only do they have better cards typically, I will go and check the player profile afterwards and they often have many more trophies than I do. You know a matchmaking system is broken when you are consistently outgunned and compete against players with higher achievements/skill in the game. I really can't make sense of the matchmaking algorithm. I am sure they put a ton of work into it but it is about as bad as it gets. This is only in reference to war. Single player matchmaking is actually pretty good. As background, I actually play 6 accounts ranging from 4300 trophies on my lowest to a high of 5800 on my best account. The only reason I even play war is to get points for my clan and because I don't want to let them down. I HATE having to play war and definitely wouldn't if I wasn't in a clan. Supercell, PLEASE FIX. Honkai: Star Rail is a HoYoverse space fantasy RPG. Hop aboard the Astral Express and experience the galaxy's infinite wonders filled with adventure and thrills. Players will meet new companions across various worlds and maybe even run into some familiar faces. Overcome the struggles together caused by Stellaron and unravel the hidden truths behind it! May this journey lead us starward! □ Explore Distinct Worlds — Discover the boundless universe filled with wonder 3, 2, 1, initiating warp! A space station with Curios sealed away, a foreign planet with an eternal winter, a starship hunting down abominations, the Planet of Festivities nested in sweet dreams, The Eternal Land where destiny hangs by a thread, the arcadia that had once fallen into a painting scroll... Every stop of the Astral Express is a never-before-seen view of the galaxy! Explore fantastical worlds and civilizations, uncover mysteries beyond imagination, and set out on a journey of wonder! □ Riveting RPG Experience — A best-in-class immersive adventure beyond the stars Embark on a galactic adventure where you shape the story. Our cutting-edge engine renders high-quality cinematics in real-time, our innovative facial expression system concocts genuine sentiments, and HOYO-MiX's original score sets the stage. Join us now and journey through a universe of conflict and collaboration, where your choices define the outcome! □ Fateful Encounters Await! — Cross paths with characters intertwined by destiny As you traverse the sea of stars, you'll not only have countless adventures, but also many chance encounters. You will forge friendships in a frozen land, fight side by side with comrades in the Xianzhou crisis, and have unexpected encounters in a golden dream. A game of an Aeon when the Phantasmoon waxes full... On this alien world, you will meet greet companions walking these different paths amongst the starts and experience incredible journeys together. Let your laughter and woes compose the story of your present, past, and future. □ Turn-based Combat Reimagined — Exhilarating multifaceted gameplay fueled by strategy and skill Engage in a combat system that sports a variety of team compositions. Match your lineups based on your enemy's qualities and strike while the iron is hot to bring down your foes and claim victory! Break Weaknesses! Deliver Follow-up Attacks! Deal Damage over Time... and try out the brand-new Aha Instant! Countless strategies and tactics await your unlocking. Build an approach suited for you and face the onrush of successive challenges! Beyond the thrilling turn-based combat, there are also simulation management modes, casual elimination mini-games, puzzle exploration, and more... Explore an exciting variety of gameplay and experience endless possibilities! □ Top-Tier Voice Actors for an Immersive Experience — A dream team of multiple language dubs assembled for the entire story When words come alive, when stories give you a choice, when characters possess a soul... We present to you dozens of emotions, hundreds of facial expressions, thousands of lore pieces, and a million words that make up this universe's beating heart. With full voice-over in four languages, the characters will transcend their virtual existences and become your tangible companions, creating a new chapter in this tale together with you.   • Rewarding and Timeless

    04/10/2025

    cissaluv

    This game may have its issues with powercreep, but I'm pretty sure it will stay playable for f2p, seeing as a large portion of the player base prefers saving money, or simply keeping the challenge. I'm hoping that isn't compromised anytime soon. Regardless, HSR is my favorite gacha game I've played (I played the other 2 big dogs in the gacha world.) The quests are always either funny, profound, engaging, or comforting. The events are very entertaining and well-thought out, but I must ask you to provide more of them! After finishing an event, I feel dread because I don't want to run out of them so quickly, and it seems that Hoyo is a bit slow on pumping them out. The characters are very much my favorite aspect of the game, with lots of nuance, different motivations, and they're not always fixated on the MC, thus letting each character have its own independent value, with whatever unique role they play. The combat is great, I love being strategic but not being stressed by real-time combat, as my hands and fingers hurt sometimes and don't allow me to react quickly. The game environments are engaging, and I hope Hoyo can put out as many puzzles / chests out as possible, as it's one of the easiest ways for f2p to quickly and mindlessly collect stellar jades, though it does take time to find them. Overall, HSR is so relaxing to play, but interesting and "personal" in a way too. The dialogue is pretty good!

  • Definitely Worth Trying

    02/05/2024

    Csmith1035

    We have to keep in mind that this is a f2p game with a very straightforward combat system and it is not without its flaws. With that said, I see a ton of people complain about the difficulty of certain fights and the unlucky outcomes of hours of grinding for level up and ascension materials as well as of course, the rolls to summon new fighters and light cones. I’ve also seen complaints about too much story and not enough gameplay. I don’t disagree with any of these points. HOWEVER, my personal experience with this game in the month since I’ve started playing has made it clear that you can’t please everyone and there are bound to be issues. This is made even more apparent considering how much FUN I’ve had with this game. Between the main story, the development of specific characters and introductions of new ones, the music, the graphics and sound design as well as the combat visuals, I can honestly say I’ve never had a more pleasant experience playing any mobile game. There were times where the story stagnated a little, but getting involved in the events and learning new styles of playing made up for that. And I ABSOLUTELY HATED the boss fight with Phantylia most of all. But I never spent a penny and I eventually strategized well enough to scrape through it despite the challenges. This is all purely objective and long-winded. But I believe this is an excellent game overall and I don’t regret picking it up. I will continue to support this game for as long as it stays consistent.

  • Wow definitely deserves a 5 star rating

    11/15/2023

    thedudeaj

    So I have played a few Hoyo games and the most recent of their games that I have played is Genshin Impact. Now I have played a few turn based games in my life and this one has really amazed me. Now all of the things that HKSR has put into their game is absolutely fantastic. I have to say that not only this team listen to their community but they go above and beyond what they should have to do for this game. Starting with a free 10 pulls every patch but not just that, but also a great story, interesting characters, and long lasting content. I do believe that these devs have made quality of life changes into this game that not only I wish was in Genshin Impact, but it almost make me mad playing Genshin, because the content, and quality of life is soo good in HKSR. The fact that you are not limited to farming and leveling up your characters to specific days like in Genshin makes the enjoyment of this game skyrocket. I also think that the story is absolutely amazing. The way that the playable characters in the game are the ones that are involved in the story of the game also feels much more immersive compared to Genshin’s npc #280 that we don’t care about this game puts the playable characters at the forefront of the games story. Also the simulated universe, and memory of chaos is amazing place to test out fun team comps and test your accounts strength. Lastly the standard banner characters are quite good compared to Genshin’s lackluster 5 star roster.

Hop aboard the Astral Express and experience the galaxy's infinite wonders filled with adventure and thrills. Players will meet new companions across various worlds and maybe even run into some familiar faces. Overcome the struggles together caused by Stellaron and unravel the hidden truths behind it! May this journey lead us starward! a Explore Distinct Worlds - Discover the boundless universe filled with wonder 3, 2, 1, initiating warp! A space station with Curios sealed away, a foreign planet with an eternal winter, a starship hunting down abominations, the Planet of Festivities nested in sweet dreams, The Eternal Land where destiny hangs by a thread, the arcadia that had once fallen into a painting scroll ... Every stop of the Astral Express is a never-before-seen view of the galaxy! Explore fantastical worlds and civilizations, uncover mysteries beyond imagination, and set out on a journey of wonder! Riveting RPG Experience - A best-in-class immersive adventure beyond the stars Embark on a galactic adventure where you shape the story. Our cutting-edge engine renders high-quality cinematics in real- time, our innovative facial expression system concocts genuine sentiments, and HOYO-MiX's original score sets the stage. Join us now and journey through a universe of conflict and collaboration, where your choices define the outcome! o Fateful Encounters Await! - Cross paths with characters intertwined by destiny As you traverse the sea of stars, you'll not only have countless adventures, but also many chance encounters. You will forge friendships in a frozen land, fight side by side with comrades in the Xianzhou crisis, and have unexpected encounters in a golden dream. A game of an Aeon when the Phantasmoon waxes full ... On this alien world, you will meet greet companions walking these different paths amongst the starts and experience incredible journeys together. Let your laughter and woes compose the story of your present, past, and future. Turn-based Combat Reimagined - Exhilarating multifaceted gameplay fueled by strategy and skill Engage in a combat system that sports a variety of team compositions. Match your lineups based on your enemy's qualities and strike while the iron is hot to bring down your foes and claim victory! Break Weaknesses! Deliver Follow-up Attacks! Deal Damage over Time ... and try out the brand-new Aha Instant! Countless strategies and tactics await your unlocking. Build an approach suited for you and face the onrush of successive challenges! Beyond the thrilling turn-based combat, there are also simulation management modes, casual elimination mini-games, puzzle exploration, and more ... Explore an exciting variety of gameplay and experience endless possibilities! Top-Tier Voice Actors for an Immersive Experience - A dream team of multiple language dubs assembled for the entire story When words come alive, when stories give you a choice, when characters possess a soul ... We present to you dozens of emotions, hundreds of facial expressions, thousands of lore pieces, and a million words that make up this universe's beating heart. With full voice-over in four languages, the characters will transcend their virtual existences and become your tangible companions, creating a new chapter in this tale together with you.   • Creative and User-Enhancing Suggestions

    07/01/2024

    wucls

    Dear Instagram Developers, I hope this message finds you well. I am writing to offer a few suggestions that I believe would greatly benefit and enhance the functionality of Instagram. Firstly, I propose the inclusion of a feature that would allow users to add music to their profiles. This addition would undoubtedly add a whole new dimension of creativity and personalization, empowering users to express themselves through their favorite tunes. Secondly, I would like to address a concern regarding the white circle that surrounds the profile photo. In my opinion, this visual element can sometimes disrupt the overall aesthetic and proportion of the photo. I respectfully suggest that the option to remove or customize this circle be made available, allowing users to further curate their profiles in alignment with their personal branding. Last but not least, I would like to express my desire for Instagram to support the option of using GIFs as profile photos. This animated form of self-expression would undoubtedly inject a playful and engaging element into users' profiles, increasing their appeal and individuality. I genuinely believe that these proposals could positively impact the Instagram user experience, fostering increased creativity and allowing for further personalization. I appreciate your time and consideration, and I eagerly look forward to seeing the continued evolution of the platform. Thank you for your attention to these suggestions.

    Instagram is a really good app and I love it but I had a problem recently… Someone made an account pretending to be me they used one my pictures from my page and used my name and middle name as well, at first I thought it was a friend but then I realized it was someone else I reported that account but they didn’t take the account down. I also asked everyone I follow, friends almost everyone on Instagram to report the account which they did and the account was still not taken down! I had people after people after people reporting this account and they still would not take the account down after a while I gave up because I’m not gonna waste my time if you guys aren’t doing anything about it. A couple weeks later I had a message request from that account making a joke about it saying “Hey can you stop pretending to be me!?” And then they said “nah I’m just kidding I don’t wanna be you anymore, here’s the password to this account” and the password to the account actually worked there wasn’t no email or phone number which was odd. I’m glad this person stopped pretending to be me! But that is not the point. That person can be pretending to be someone else as I type this right now and the fact that you guys didn’t do anything to try and help is sickening honestly. Honestly love the app but you guys gotta do better people should not be able to pretend be someone else and then when we ask for you to take there account down you refuse very unhappy with that. Hope this review helped just be careful especially with your children on this app, Thank you.

With the Spotify app, you can explore an extensive library of music and podcasts for free. Curate the best playlists and stream millions of free songs, albums, and original podcasts on your phone or tablet. Subscribe to Spotify Premium to download and listen offline wherever you are, and unlock our catalog of audiobooks. Why choose Spotify as your go-to music and podcast app? Here, you can: • Listen to over 100 million songs and 6 million podcast titles • Explore our selection of specially-crafted artist playlists • Easily search for your favorite songs, albums, artists, and podcasts • Discover personalized music recommendations tailored to your unique taste • Subscribe to your favorite free podcasts so you never miss an episode, and even curate your own podcast library Spotify Free is more than a music player - find the sounds you love and stream music and podcasts online, for free. Enjoy personalized playlists or curate and share your own, discover the hottest new releases, explore upcoming events from your favorites, and more. • Stream millions of free songs and podcasts • Create playlists with your favorite music • Share songs and playlists with friends and family (feature restrictions may apply in some regions) • Discover personalized playlists made just for you, and collaborate on playlists with your friends • Enjoy your personal Discover Weekly playlist every week • Stay in the know with the Release Radar and New Music Friday playlists • Find nearby events and gigs by your favorite artists • See your most played songs, genres, artists, and more with yearly Spotify Wrapped • Stream music across your devices with Spotify • Use Spotify Connect and enjoy listening on smart speakers, desktop, laptop, smart TV, Chromecast, PlayStation®, Xbox®, smartwatch, in your car, and more - limited number of device models apply Spotify Premium - a great way to enjoy the benefits of an offline music player, and stream music without WiFi. By pressing download, you can access your songs, playlists, podcasts, and audiobooks offline, wherever you are. • Listen to music, podcasts, and audiobooks - all in one place • Ad-free music listening: enjoy your music with no ad interruptions • Enjoy full on-demand playback • Audiobooks in Premium are currently available in the US, UK, Australia, Ireland, New Zealand, and Canada. Discover 250,000+ audiobook titles with 15 hours/month of available listening for Premium Individual subscribers and Duo & Family plan managers. • Superior sound quality on supported devices • AI DJ: a personalized guide that knows your music taste so well it can choose what to play for you • Enjoy on desktop, phone, tablet, computer, smartwatch, and in your car • Listen and control the listening session together by hosting a Jam in real time with friends • Download songs, podcasts, and audiobooks for offline listening, without an internet connection • No contract required - cancel your subscription whenever you want Spotify lets you play music wherever you are. Listen to your favorite songs and discover new music, podcasts, and audiobooks with the Spotify app! LOVE SPOTIFY? Follow us on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/spotify Follow us on TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@spotify

  • Favorite app ever

    11/26/2024

    l.lacx

    I personally love this app. I have had it for over 4 years, and it’s been an app I use daily. If you are thinking about getting it, for sure get the Premium plan, no ads, endless skipping of songs, shuffle play, and a good amount of more things. One thing I will say is frustrating is the constant change of the like button to songs, they removed the heart for whatever reason and with that they made adding a song to a playlist but not your liked songs a lot harder, with a drop down feature you have to scroll down to find the playlist you want. I will say that I love that you can get to choose if you want your playlists public or not because let's be honest some playlists do not need to see the light of day but can still be enjoyed in peace. I also like what they did with the front page, being able to just swipe right to click onto our profile and access our settings much easier. My most favorite feature that might not be new but I did just discover, is on that same page where we access the settings and our profile there is this “Recents” tab where you can go and see all of the songs you’ve listened to and the amount of times I’ve used it to find a song I liked in someone else's playlist, or a podcast episode I was listening to but didn’t save, my lord I love that feature so much. But overall it’s a really good app and something that if you get it, it will be used in your daily life if you are a fanatic music listener.

  • Please go back

    11/13/2020

    Emanjeudy

    I love the app but not so much the new update. Please give us a retro date. Also the option to go to your liked songs library and not all your playlist with out liked songs as a playlist. To add whenever I like a album the songs do not save, I have to like each song individually for it to save to my library, or “liked songs playlist”. Whenever I click on the artist it only shows me the artist I follow and then artist suggestions based on music I like. Please just go back to when we click on artist it shows us all artist that we have saved in our library. Or simply JUST A RETRO-DATE FROM AROUND LIKE 2016 please. And the hearts next to the liked songs make no sense when we already know that they are liked songs. You can easily click on it by accident and not remember what song you deleted. The queue should show what songs you recently listened to. Not saying it should show every last song you listened to but at leas like the last 20, just a suggestion to make the app better. Lastly theres only alphabetical quick scroll on our liked songs “playlist”, which should just be a music library as stated before. We need alphabetical quick scroll in all playlist, or at least the ones we decide to put in alphabetical order. Also you should add back the “skip song” when adding an album to a playlist with a song from the album already in it. We only have the option of canceling adding the album to the playlist or just hit add anyway. When will people behind apps realize theres never a need for a unnecessary update.

  • Stop changing the queue!!!!!

    12/29/2022

    I_am_theSquirrel

    Stop changing the way the queue works every single time I use this app! I swear Im this close to subscribing to apple music 👌. Just let me keep the option to play my liked songs randomly or not. Also why did I suddenly lose the option to play my liked songs based on genre?! You guys are killing me with the constant changes. Heres what the people want! To be able to play my liked songs randomly or in or order!!! I like the option sometimes! I also still want to be able to sort my liked songs by genre. Why did that suddenly go away!? I used to like the way you could channel what you want based your mood ‘like “happy”’ and whatnot but whatever, I could deal with the changes you made for whatever reason.   • Where’s the functionality?

    09/24/2018

    CoreySomers

    1) I can’t play JUST a playlist or JUST an album. I press play on a playlist or album and the next song doesn’t play on that album!! Why? ⭐️ MOST NEEDED FEATURE⭐️: 2) I can’t quickly add songs to a playlist. I have to touch the “...” and individually add songs to a playlist rather than being able to select multiple songs to transfer to a playlist. This makes it a pain to create playlists unless you simply add an entire album to a playlist, which is the only way to add multiple songs at one time to a playlist. I noticed that you can do this at the bottom of the playlist after you scroll through your songs, but only for “recommended” music which is great, but it’s random and not mine sometimes. You should be able to scroll through your saved music and click on each song you’d like to add to a specific (or multiple) playlist without having to click “...” first. For example, I hate to compare but Apple Music has a feature where you can click “Playlist”>”Edit”>”Add Music” which then brings you to your library to add music from there OR you can search music to add that you have not yet saved or downloaded.3) I love the idea of being able to discover new music and whatnot. Thought I’d add at least one good thing to the list. It’s a great app, but until these issues are fixed, I’m keeping it at 3 stars.Edit: 1st issue resolved with their great tech support team! However, still only 4 stars because I can’t use the mobile app to add multiple songs at one time to a playlist. (This is only a big deal because it takes forever to create a brand new playlist).

gold_text: Spotify: Music and Podcasts Songs & Playlists For You Free With the Spotify app, you can explore an extensive library of music and podcasts for free. Curate the best playlists and stream millions of free songs, albums, and original podcasts on your phone or tablet. Subscribe to Spotify Premium to download and listen offline wherever you are, and unlock our catalog of audiobooks. Why choose Spotify as your go-to music and podcast app? Here, you can: . Listen to over 100 million songs and 6 million podcast titles . Explore our selection of specially-crafted artist playlists . Easily search for your favorite songs, albums, artists, and podcasts . Discover personalized music recommendations tailored to your unique taste . Subscribe to your favorite free podcasts so you never miss an episode, and even curate your own podcast library Spotify Free is more than a music player - find the sounds you love and stream music and podcasts online, for free. Enjoy personalized playlists or curate and share your own, discover the hottest new releases, explore upcoming events from your favorites, and more. . Stream millions of free songs and podcasts . Create playlists with your favorite music Share songs and playlists with friends and family (feature restrictions may apply in some regions) . Discover personalized playlists made just for you, and collaborate on playlists with your friends . Enjoy your personal Discover Weekly playlist every week . Stay in the know with the Release Radar and New Music Friday playlists . Find nearby events and gigs by your favorite artists See your most played songs, genres, artists, and more with yearly Spotify Wrapped . Stream music across your devices with Spotify . Use Spotify Connect and enjoy listening on smart speakers, desktop, laptop, smart TV, Chromecast, PlayStation, Xbox, smartwatch, in your car, and more - limited number of device models apply Spotify Premium - a great way to enjoy the benefits of an offline music player, and stream music without WiFi. By pressing download, you can access your songs, playlists, podcasts, and audiobooks offline, wherever you are. . Listen to music, podcasts, and audiobooks - all in one place . Ad-free music listening: enjoy your music with no ad interruptions . Enjoy full on-demand playback . Audiobooks in Premium are currently available in the US, UK, Australia, Ireland, New Zealand, and Canada. Discover 250,000+ audiobook titles with 15 hours/month of available listening for Premium Individual subscribers and Duo & Family plan managers. . Superior sound quality on supported devices . AI DJ: a personalized guide that knows your music taste so well it can choose what to play for you . Enjoy on desktop, phone, tablet, computer, smartwatch, and in your car . Listen and control the listening session together by hosting a Jam in real time with friends . Download songs, podcasts, and audiobooks for offline listening, without an internet connection . No contract required - cancel your subscription whenever you want Spotify lets you play music wherever you are. Listen to your favorite songs and discover new music, podcasts, and audiobooks with the Spotify app! Favorite app ever I personally love this app. I have had it for over 4 years, and it's been an app I use daily. If you are thinking about getting it, for sure get the Premium plan, no ads, endless skipping of songs, shuffle play, and a good amount of more things. One thing I will say is frustrating is the constant change of the like button to songs, they removed the heart for whatever reason and with that they made adding a song to a playlist but not your liked songs a lot harder, with a drop down feature you have to scroll down to find the playlist you want. I will say that I love that you can get to choose if you want your playlists public or not because let's be honest some playlists do not need to see the light of day but can still be enjoyed in peace. I also like what they did with the front page, being able to just swipe right to click onto our profile and access our settings much easier. My most favorite feature that might not be new but I did just discover, is on that same page where we access the settings and our profile there is this "Recents" tab where you can go and see all of the songs you've listened to and the amount of times I've used it to find a song I liked in someone else's playlist, or a podcast episode I was listening to but didn't save, my lord I love that feature so much. But overall it's a really good app and something that if you get it, it will be used in your daily life if you are a fanatic music listener. I love the app but not so much the new update. Please give us a retro date. Also the option to go to your liked songs library and not all your playlist with out liked songs as a playlist. To add whenever I like a album the songs do not save, I have to like each song individually for it to save to my library, or "liked songs playlist". Whenever I click on the artist it only shows me the artist I follow and then artist suggestions based on music I like. Please just go back to when we click on artist it shows us all artist that we have saved in our library. Or simply JUST A RETRO-DATE FROM AROUND LIKE 2016 please. And the hearts next to the liked songs make no sense when we already know that they are liked songs. You can easily click on it by accident and not remember what song you deleted. The queue should show what songs you recently listened to. Not saying it should show every last song you listened to but at leas like the last 20, just a suggestion to make the app better. Lastly theres only alphabetical quick scroll on our liked songs "playlist", which should just be a music library as stated before. We need alphabetical quick scroll in all playlist, or at least the ones we decide to put in alphabetical order. Also you should add back the "skip song" when adding an album to a playlist with a song from the album already in it. We only have the option of canceling adding the album to the playlist or just hit add anyway. When will people behind apps realize theres never a need for a unnecessary update. Stop changing the way the queue works every single time I use this app! I swear Im this close to subscribing to apple music . Just let me keep the option to play my liked songs randomly or not. Also why did I suddenly lose the option to play my liked songs based on genre ?! You guys are killing me with the constant changes. Heres what the people want!
